description: An AI-powered after-hours medical triage agent that handles patient calls when offices are closed. Routes urgent symptoms to on-call providers, collects patient information, and creates after-hours tickets for next-day follow-up. Includes medical safety guardrails and emergency detection.
shortDescription: After-hours medical triage with urgent symptom routing and safety guardrails.

locked.lockReason: Set by template — changing the agent type would break workflow guardrails
Controlled by template to ensure consistent performance
Core prompt is managed by the template to maintain guardrails and compliance
Medical templates require a fixed temperature for safety compliance
